F.formula: F = edge-F1(R, T) = 2PR/(P+R), R=recovered do(base+17) 1-step edges, T=true oracle edges (do 0/base+17/base+37, full horizon)
F.plain: F1 of the single-shot recovered data-flow edges against the exact-oracle true data-flow graph over 8 candidate cells.
F.note: Graph-valued primitive = edge F1 vs true data-flow graph, exactly the paper's connectomics case. Runner A1_connectomics.jl L406,L367-386; record out/A1_pong.json extra.triad.F=0.0 / graph.f1.

S.formula: S = agree/total over off-diagonal edges, agree = #(R AND H) + #(NOT R AND NOT H); H = true edges under held-out do(base+37)
S.plain: Off-diagonal edge agreement between the base+17 recovered graph and the held-out base+37 true edge set (unseen intervention value).
S.note: Held-out edge agreement between the base+17 recovered graph and the held-out base+37 true edge set: a non-null held-out sufficiency. §3 (sec:triad) admits the fraction-within-tolerance [0,1] special case of the held-out predictive test, which this off-diagonal edge-agreement fraction satisfies. A1_connectomics.jl L412-416,L571-591; record S=0.839.

M.plain: True-graph edge count over the number of recovered edges (edge-level |U*|/|U_hat|).
M.note: Runner now emits M = |U*|/|U_hat| over edges (M_note '|true edges|=12 / |discovered edges|=0'); the paper's minimality ratio applied at the edge level. Record out/A1_pong.json extra.triad.M (null in pong when 0 edges discovered). Replaced the former 1 − FP-rate (edge precision).

F.formula: F = Spearman(rho)(lesion_imp, oracle_role); lesion_imp = max screen/RAM break over clamp{0, base XOR 0xFF}; oracle_role = max over do-set{0, base+17, base+37, base XOR 0xFF} full horizon
F.plain: Spearman rank correlation between the single-unit lesion importance map and the exact-oracle per-unit causal role over 8 units.
F.note: Rank correlation of attribution vs oracle causal effects; matches the paper's ranked-output correlation primitive. A2_lesions.jl L621,L637,L378-409; record out/A2_lesions_pong.json triad.F=1.0.

S.formula: S = Spearman(rho)(lesion_imp, heldout_role); heldout_role = per-unit role under UNSEEN do(base+37) only, full horizon
S.plain: Rank correlation of the lesion map (built on {0, alt}) vs the per-unit role under the held-out clamp value base+37.
S.note: Rank correlation in [-1,1] of the lesion map (built on {0,alt}) vs the per-unit role under the held-out clamp value base+37: a non-null held-out predictive correlation, the §3 (sec:triad) form. A2_lesions.jl; record S=0.836.

M.plain: Number of oracle-causal units over the number of units the lesion map names above threshold.
M.note: Runner now emits M = |U*|/|U_hat| (M_note '|U*|=4 (oracle movers) / |U_hat|=4 (method above-threshold)'), the paper's set-size ratio. Record out/A2_lesions_pong.json extra.triad.M=1.0. Replaced the former 1 − false-specificity rate.

F.formula: F = Spearman(rho)(sel, oracle_importance); sel = per-cell max |Pearson| to game variables (excl. self, excl. frame clock); oracle_importance = max whole-screen break over do{0, base+17, base+37}
F.plain: Spearman correlation between per-cell game-variable tuning selectivity and the oracle causal importance over 8 candidate cells.
F.note: Scored vs oracle causal importance (not vs external labels); the per-game clip-at-0-then-mean is applied at aggregation (paper cites A3 = 0.213 clip-at-zero mean). Runner A3_tuning.jl L466,L318-338; record out/A3_tuning_pong.json triad.F=-0.007.

S.formula: S = Pearson(sel, held_out); held_out = whole-screen break under held-out do(base+37) only
S.plain: Pearson correlation of the selectivity map vs the held-out do(base+37) screen break.
S.note: Held-out predictive correlation in [-1,1] of the selectivity map vs the held-out do(base+37) screen break: the §3 (sec:triad) form. A3_tuning.jl; record S=0.441 (battery air_raid).

M.plain: Number of oracle-causal cells over the number of strongly-tuned cells the method names.
M.note: Runner now emits M = |U*|/|U_hat| (M_note '|U*|=10 (oracle movers) / |U_hat|=7 (method above-threshold)'), the paper's set-size ratio. Record out/A3_tuning_*.json extra.triad.M. Replaced the former 1 − spurious-tuning rate.

F.formula: F = Spearman(rho)(|corr|_pairs, coupling_pairs) over 28 candidate-cell pairs; coupling(i,j) = max |delta cell_j| under do(i:=0)/do(i:=base+17), symmetrised
F.plain: Spearman correlation between absolute pairwise data correlations and the oracle intervention-based cell-cell coupling over candidate-cell pairs.
F.note: Oracle 'coupling' is a bit-exact intervention effect (not a data correlation); F correlates the method's |corr| map against it. Correlation primitive on pairs. Runner A4_correlations.jl L648,L573-612; record out/A4_pong.json triad.F=0.633.

S.formula: S = Pearson(|corr|_pairs, held_pairs); held coupling(i,j) uses held-out do(base+37) only
S.plain: Pearson correlation of the pairwise-correlation map vs the held-out do(base+37) coupling.
S.note: Held-out predictive correlation in [-1,1] of the pairwise-correlation map vs the held-out do(base+37) coupling: the §3 (sec:triad) form (can be negative). A4_correlations.jl; record S=-0.170.

M.formula: M = |U*|/|U_hat| over candidate-cell pairs = #oracle-coupled pairs / #above-threshold named pairs
M.plain: Number of oracle-coupled cell pairs over the number of high-correlation pairs the method names.
M.note: Runner now emits M = |U*|/|U_hat| over pairs (M_note '|U*|=4 (oracle movers) / |U_hat|=6'), the paper's set-size ratio at the pair level. Record out/A4_pong.json extra.triad.M=0.667. Replaced the former 1 − correlation-overgrouping rate.

F.plain: No faithfulness score. A5 is declared a descriptive method: it reports the pooled-activity spectral structure it reveals (headline = global-pool clock-explained variance fraction), not an F vs the oracle.
F.note: Runner A5_lfp.jl explicitly sets method_kind='descriptive (no oracle F/S/M)' (L919-922,L41-47); metric_name=A5_global_pool_clock_explained_variance_fraction_epiphenomenal, value=gp.clock_var_fraction (L891-892). Record out/A5_pong.json has no triad.

S.plain: Not computed; A5 emits no S.
S.note: No S/held-out estimator in A5_lfp.jl; descriptive method by design.

M.plain: Not computed; A5 emits no M.
M.note: No minimality set in A5_lfp.jl; descriptive method by design.

F.formula: F = edge-F1(inferred, true) = 2PR/(P+R) over off-diagonal directed edges; inferred = Granger-significant directed edges, true = exact-oracle data-flow graph
F.plain: F1 of the Granger-inferred directed edges against the exact-oracle true data-flow graph over 8 candidate cells.
F.note: Graph-valued primitive = edge F1 vs true data-flow graph, matching the paper. Runner A6_granger.jl L743-744,L710-724; record out/A6_pong.json triad.F=0.0.

S.formula: S = agree/total over off-diagonal directed edges, agree = #(inferred[i,j] == heldout_true[i,j]); heldout_true = true edges under do(base+37) only
S.plain: Directed off-diagonal edge agreement (accuracy) between the Granger graph and the held-out base+37 true data-flow.
S.note: Directed off-diagonal edge agreement between the Granger graph and the held-out base+37 true data-flow: a non-null held-out sufficiency, the [0,1] fraction-within-tolerance special case §3 (sec:triad) admits. A6_granger.jl; record S=0.821.

M.plain: True-graph directed-edge count over the number of Granger-inferred edges (edge-level |U*|/|U_hat|).
M.note: Runner now emits M = |U*|/|U_hat| over edges (M_note '|true edges|=12 / |discovered edges|=1'), the paper's minimality ratio at the edge level. Record out/A6_pong.json extra.triad.M=1.0. Replaced the former 1 − false-edge rate (edge precision).

F.formula: F = Spearman(rho)(recovery, oracle_importance); recovery_cell = Sigma_j comp_energy[j] * loading[cell,j]^2 over top-k PCA/NMF components; oracle_importance = max screen break over do{0, base+17}
F.plain: Spearman correlation between each cell's PCA/NMF component-recovery score and the oracle causal importance over candidate cells (reported separately for PCA and NMF).
F.note: Two triads (triad_pca, triad_nmf); correlation vs oracle causal importance, not vs known-variable labels. Runner A7_dimred.jl L744,L682-705; record out/A7_pong.json triad_nmf.F=-0.385, triad_pca.F=-0.041.

S.formula: S = Pearson(recovery, held_out); held_out = whole-screen break under held-out do(base+37)
S.plain: Pearson correlation of the component-recovery score vs the held-out do(base+37) screen break.
S.note: Held-out predictive correlation in [-1,1] of the component-recovery score vs the held-out do(base+37) screen break: the §3 (sec:triad) form. Two triads (pca, nmf). A7_dimred.jl; record S: nmf=-0.291, pca=-0.192.

M.plain: Number of oracle-causal cells over the number of dim-reduction-surfaced cells the method names.
M.note: Runner now emits M = |U*|/|U_hat| for both triad_pca and triad_nmf (M_note '|U*|=4 (oracle movers) / |U_hat|=4/6'), the paper's set-size ratio. Record out/A7_pong.json triad_pca.M=1.0, triad_nmf.M=0.667. Replaced the former 1 − variance-not-causal over-claim rate.

F.formula: F = recall of oracle-causal candidate cells under the whole-state map = 1.0 (whole state contains every cell)
F.plain: Recall of the oracle-causal cells under the record-everything map; trivially 1.0 because the whole state includes every cell.
F.note: Scored vs the oracle causal cells but the primitive is recall (not the correlation/edge-F1 the paper specifies); it is a hard-coded 1.0 by construction, consistent with the paper's 'trivially faithful' whole-state baseline. Runner A8_wholestate.jl L561,L356-375; record out/A8_pong.json triad.F=1.0.

S.formula: S = 1.0 if lossless restore else 0.0; restore the recorded 128-byte RAM into a fresh checkpoint and require byte-identical re-rendered RAM + screen
S.plain: 1 if the recorded whole 128-byte RAM state, restored, reproduces the exact RAM and frame (lossless), else 0.
S.note: Literal sufficiency: the recorded whole 128-byte RAM state, restored, reproduces the exact RAM and frame (bit-exact re-run). §3 (sec:triad) admits the [0,1] fraction-within-tolerance special case of the held-out test; this boolean 1/0 hit is that special case at its extreme. A8_wholestate.jl; record S=1.0.

M.formula: M = |U*|/|U_hat| = n_causal / 128 (RAM_SIZE); U_hat = whole 128-byte state, U* = #oracle-causal cells
M.plain: Number of oracle-causal cells over the size of the named set (128), the whole-state minimality floor.
M.note: The only Phase-A method whose M is exactly |U*|/|U_hat|; paper cites whole-state M=0.07. Headline metric_name = wholestate_minimality_M_vs_oracle. A8_wholestate.jl L563,L537-538; record out/A8_pong.json M=0.03125 = 4/128.
